effects.effect: Target 2 Vivosaurs you control or 2 Vivosaurs your Opponent controls; swap their Vivosaur Zones.

effects.name: Tailwind
effects.effect: For each [Pterasaur] Vivosaur you control: you Charge an additional +1 FP during your Recharge.

effects.name: Tornado Wing
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: apply Poison to the defending Vivosaur.
